testimonials.title: Careers changed, in their words
testimonials.description: Thousands have used GOA to break in, level up and land the role they were after.

items.quote: I went from self-taught and stuck to a front-end role at a product company in five months. The mentorship was the difference.
GOA's project-first approach meant my portfolio actually looked like a senior's. Recruiters noticed immediately.
The AI track is unreal. I shipped a RAG product during the cohort and it became my company's flagship feature.
Best learning community I've been part of. Someone is always online to review your PR at 2am. Wild energy.
I doubled my salary and finally understand system design. The interview prep track paid for itself in a week.
As a career switcher from marketing, I never thought I could code. GOA made it feel possible — then made it real.

faq.title: Questions, answered
faq.description: Everything you need to know before you join a cohort. Still curious? Reach out any time.

items.q: Do I need prior experience to join?
items.a: No. Our tracks start from fundamentals and ramp to job-ready. If you already code, a placement quiz drops you into the right module.

items.q: How much time should I commit each week?
items.a: Plan for 12–18 hours per week. Cohorts are flexible and fully remote, with recorded sessions and async mentor support.

items.q: What makes GOA different from a bootcamp?
items.a: We are outcome-driven and project-first. You build real, reviewed software and graduate with a portfolio and a hiring network — not just a certificate.

items.q: Is there career support after I finish?
items.a: Yes. You keep lifetime access to career coaching, mock interviews, referrals and our alumni network until you land the role you want.

items.q: Are there payment plans or scholarships?
items.a: We offer monthly installments and need-based scholarships. Around 20% of every cohort joins on some form of assistance.

items.q: What if it's not for me?
items.a: There's a 14-day, no-questions-asked guarantee. If GOA isn't the right fit, you get a full refund.

header.title: We exist to turn ambition into
header.description: Goal-Oriented Academy is a modern programming school built on one belief: you learn to build by building — mentored, in the open, with real outcomes.

mission.title: A different kind of academy — obsessed with what you can build
mission.lead: Most learning stops at tutorials. We start where they end. Every week you ship a real project, get it reviewed like a professional pull request, and grow inside a community of people chasing the same goal.
points: Senior mentorship on your actual code
A network that lasts long after you graduate

items.title: 1:1 Mentorship

Built payment flows at scale. Teaches resilient architecture the pragmatic way.

Runs global edge infra. Makes Kubernetes feel approachable, not terrifying.
Crafts interfaces that feel inevitable. Bridges design and engineering.
Native-quality apps with a web team. Reanimated wizard and DX advocate.

header.title: Real people, real
header.description: No survivorship theatre — just the before, the after, and the number that changed. This is what outcome-driven looks like.

items.quote: The mentorship turned scattered knowledge into real confidence. I build things now I'd have called impossible last year.
I switched careers entirely. GOA's projects were the portfolio that got me the interview — and the skills that got me the job.
I shipped a RAG product in the cohort that became my company's flagship. GOA moved me from junior to the AI team.
The interview prep track was surgical. I finally understood the patterns and walked into offers with three companies.

newsletter.success: You're on the list. Welcome to GOA.
